ksa_text: Determine organizational compliance with privacy policies, data security standards, and regulatory requirements across all business units.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-T-006 (Security and Privacy/Task) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.457, highest: DDaT at 0.457). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. Seniority: appropriate. Data quality framework management, DQ metrics/profiling/monitoring, quality rules, remediation oversight, and cross-functional quality standards at a manager level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.457, and Security and Privacy (SP) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Security and Privacy KSA (composite 0.457)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of Data Quality Manager job postings does not surface this Security and Privacy competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
